User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the AgroFuturos Conecta platform, either a producer, a buyer, or an administrator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

role.description: The user's role within the platform (e.g., producer, buyer, admin).

phoneNumber.description: The user's phone number, used for authentication.

Production.title: Production
Production.description: Represents a farmer's production record, tracking all stages from planning to post-harvest.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Production entity.

producerId.description: Reference to User (the producer). (Relationship: User 1:N Production)

type.description: The type of production (e.g., agricultural, livestock).

product.description: The specific product being produced (e.g., tomato, lettuce, chicken).

quantity.description: The quantity of product being produced (e.g., in kg, tons).

area.description: The area of land used for production (e.g., in hectares).

initialInvestment.description: The initial investment made for the production.

currentState.description: The current state of the production (e.g., planting, growth, harvest).

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product listed for sale on the AgroFuturos Conecta platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

name.description: The name of the product (e.g., Tomatoes).

unitPrice.description: The price per unit of the product.

availableQuantity.description: The quantity of the product available for sale.

images.description: Array of URLs of images for the product.

isFutureProduct.description: Indicates whether the product is a future product (not yet harvested).

Offer.title: Offer
Offer.description: Represents an offer made by a buyer for a product listed on the AgroFuturos Conecta platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Offer entity.

buyerId.description: Reference to User (the buyer). (Relationship: User 1:N Offer)

quantity.description: The quantity of the product being offered.

pricePerUnit.description: The price per unit offered by the buyer.

deliveryDate.description: The desired delivery date specified by the buyer.

conditions.description: Any specific conditions or requirements specified by the buyer.

status.description: The current status of the offer (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected).

Contract.title: Contract
Contract.description: Represents a contract agreement between a producer and a buyer for a product on the AgroFuturos Conecta platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Contract entity.

producerId.description: Reference to User (the producer). (Relationship: User 1:N Contract)

buyerId.description: Reference to User (the buyer). (Relationship: User 1:N Contract)

quantity.description: The agreed quantity of the product.

pricePerUnit.description: The agreed price per unit of the product.

status.description: The current status of the contract (e.g., active, completed, cancelled).

contractDocumentUrl.description: URL to the contract document (e.g., PDF).

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a message exchanged between users on the AgroFuturos Conecta platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Message entity.

senderId.description: Reference to User (the sender). (Relationship: User 1:N Message)

receiverId.description: Reference to User (the receiver). (Relationship: User 1:N Message)

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was sent.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a notification sent to a user on the AgroFuturos Conecta platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

userId.description: Reference to User (the user receiving the notification). (Relationship: User 1:N Notification)

type.description: The type of notification (e.g., new offer, contract update).

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the notification was sent.

isRead.description: Indicates whether the notification has been read by the user.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Uses path-based ownership for user data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores production records for each user. Uses path-based ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: productionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the production record.

definition.description: Stores product listings under each production record. Uses path-based ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: productionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the production record.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product.

definition.description: Stores offers made on products. Security rules will need to ensure the offer's productId matches the document ID and that only authenticated users can create offers.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product.

params.name: offerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the offer.

definition.description: Stores contract agreements between producers and buyers. Includes producerId, buyerId, and productId for querying.

params.name: contractId
params.description: The unique identifier for the contract.

definition.description: Stores messages exchanged between users. Includes senderId and receiverId for querying messages for a specific user.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the message.

definition.description: Stores notifications for each user. Uses path-based ownership for private notifications.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the notification.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to adhere to the principles of Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, Access Modeling, and Data Clarity. User data is stored in `/users/{userId}`, providing path-based ownership for private user data. Productions are stored in `/users/{userId}/productions/{productionId}`, products in `/users/{userId}/productions/{productionId}/products/{productId}` which allows a hierarchical ownership making security rules simpler. Offers are stored in a subcollection `/products/{productId}/offers/{offerId}`. Contracts can be placed at the root level for simpler querying across all contracts. Messages are stored in a separate collection `/messages/{messageId}`, with senderId and receiverId for querying messages for a specific user. Notifications are stored under `/users/{userId}/notifications/{notificationId}`.

Authorization Independence:
Ownership is established directly through path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}`).  This avoids the need for `get()` calls to parent documents to validate ownership, thus ensuring atomic operations (transactions/batches) are possible and simplifying security rules.

QAPs Support:
*   Secure List Operations: Path-based ownership ensures that listing productions or products under a specific user is secure because rules can easily validate the user ID.
*   The membership map is not used because we do not have collaborative documents.
